description: Accounts Receivable transaction line table. Each record represents a billed line, tax line, freight line, or charge line belonging to a receivables transaction and provides item, quantity, pricing, tax, and revenue recognition detail for billing and accounting.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the receivables transaction line identified by the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the receivables transaction header to which the record belongs.

columns.name: LINE_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence line nu.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Ledger identifier in which accounting entries are recorded.

columns.name: REASON_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying reason for the record.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory item master record associated with the transaction.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text business description entered to explain the purpose or content of the transaction.

columns.name: PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related previous customer trx record.

columns.name: PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related previous customer trx line record.

columns.name: QUANTITY_ORDERED
columns.description: Quantity associated with quantit for the transaction.

columns.name: QUANTITY_CREDITED
columns.description: Quantity associated with quantity for the transaction.

columns.name: QUANTITY_INVOICED
columns.description: Quantity associated with quantity for the transaction.

columns.name: UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE
columns.description: Price amount used for unit standard valuation or billing.

columns.name: UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
columns.description: Price amount used for unit selling valuation or billing.

columns.name: SALES_ORDER
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SALES_ORDER_REVISION
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SALES_ORDER_LINE
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SALES_ORDER_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the referenced sales order was created or booked.

columns.name: ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the accounting rule that controls revenue recognition timing.

columns.name: ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: LINE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control line processing.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: RULE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date for the accounting or billing rule application.

columns.name: INITIAL_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related initial customer trx line record.

columns.name: INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT
columns.description: Context value used to interpret or derive interface line.

columns.name: SALES_ORDER_SOURCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TAXABLE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether taxable applies to the record.

columns.name: EXTENDED_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing extended for the transaction.

columns.name: REVENUE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing revenue for the transaction.

columns.name: AUTORULE_COMPLETE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether autorule complete applies to the record.

columns.name: LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related link to cust trx line record.

columns.name: TAX_PRECEDENCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TAX_RATE
columns.description: Tax rate applied to calculate the tax amount.

columns.name: ITEM_EXCEPTION_RATE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related item exception rate record.

columns.name: TAX_EXEMPTION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related tax exemption record.

columns.name: MEMO_LINE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related memo line record.

columns.name: AUTORULE_DURATION_PROCESSED
columns.description: Business attribute of the receivables transaction line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: UOM_CODE

business_questions: Show line-level billing details for a customer transaction.
Find item, tax, freight, and charge lines on an AR invoice.
Display quantities, unit prices, and extended amounts by line.
Show revenue-related details for invoice lines.
Find transaction lines for a specific inventory item.
Identify tax-exempt or tax-recoverable invoice lines.
Show lines linked to previous transactions or credits.
Display ship-to references and operational attributes by line.
